input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
fix: render /public SVGs through Next image optimizer

Next.js 15 blocks SVG via /_next/image by default (returns 400),
which left the hero portrait and project tile logos invisible.
Enable dangerouslyAllowSVG with a script-less CSP sandbox so the
embedded SVGs render without opening an XSS surface.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: restore hero portrait with real PNG

The SVG placeholder was a flat gradient with tiny text, so the hero
slot read as "empty" in the browser. Swap in the actual portrait.png
and add a sizes hint matching the 65vw/120vw parent so the optimizer
doesn't ship the 1.5 MB original at every breakpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -5

cd /Users/benjaminpoersch/Projects/WEB/BP-CV/bp_cv
git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
feat: swap project tiles and hero to real assets as WebP

Replace the gradient SVG placeholders for DYAI and Bazodiac with the
actual branded artwork, drop in the new LeanDeep demo video for the
hover-play tile, and move the hero portrait from 1.5 MB PNG to WebP.
All three stills are cwebp q=82–85, yielding 94–97% size reductions
so the optimizer doesn't re-encode multi-MB originals per breakpoint.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)" 2>&1 | tail -5
